base_configuration.description: Research-grade retrieval benchmark with four experiments: pattern-only retrieval under late forecasting-regime qrels, whole-series versus pattern retrieval, no-leak retrieval ablation, and pattern-length sensitivity. Relevance judgments are built from 3-bin late-window forecasting regimes. Retrieval systems use only pre-holdout visible histories. IR diagnostics include query-level metrics, qrels density, bootstrap confidence intervals, and paired randomization tests against random ranking.
base_configuration.forecast_panel_note: Default panel uses two statistical models from StatsForecast (AutoETS, AutoARIMA) and two machine-learning models through MLForecast (LightGBM, XGBoost). Pass --skip-ml-models to use only AutoETS and AutoARIMA.

retrieval_policy.systems: rank using only information available before each object's held-out late window
retrieval_policy.content_baselines: raw, DTW, TSFEL, and their fusions are computed on pre-holdout visible prefixes

qrels_definition.binning: quantile bins fitted on the indexed collection and applied to query objects
qrels_definition.retrieval_information: retrieval systems use only the pre-holdout prefix; qrels use the held-out late window only as evaluation labels
qrels_definition.relevance_4: same error bin, same best model, and same disagreement bin
qrels_definition.relevance_3: same error bin and either same best model or same disagreement bin
qrels_definition.relevance_1: adjacent error bin, same best model, and same disagreement bin

exp1_pattern_main.question: Which pattern retrieval systems recover late-window forecasting-regime relevance?

exp2_whole_vs_pattern.question: Are local patterns better retrieval objects than complete series under forecasting-regime relevance?

exp3_retrieval_ablation.question: How much late forecast-regime relevance is recovered by random ranking and the best content retrieval baseline?
exp3_retrieval_ablation.anti_circularity: qrels use late forecast profiles as evaluation labels; all retrieval systems use only pre-holdout information.

exp4_pattern_length_sensitivity.question: How sensitive are the retrieval conclusions to the chosen subsequence length?
